## Outcome

What user or product outcome does this change deliver?

## Scope

What changed, and what is intentionally excluded?

## Verification

How was the change tested or reviewed?

## Product and architecture checks

- [ ] Respects “No use. No see.”
- [ ] Preserves property provenance and inheritance
- [ ] Keeps character identity separate from scene context
- [ ] Keeps AI provider-independent where applicable
- [ ] Includes or updates an ADR for consequential decisions
- [ ] Contains no secrets or private production assets

## Follow-ups

List any intentionally deferred work.
